metadata.strategy_description: 4H volatility breakout with expanding BBs and directional SMA. 1H entry on pullback to SMA confirmed by reversal pattern. Stop at previous 1H swing high/low. Target 1:1.

verdict.conclusion: Strategy does not meet minimum quality thresholds. Issues: Significant performance degradation from in-sample to out-of-sample — possible overfitting.
warnings: Significant performance degradation from in-sample to out-of-sample — possible overfitting
